findings.description: Section s2 (<tab:content>) is missing the `title` attribute name from hints. The attribute table lists `title` as a required (◎) attribute.
findings.source_evidence: Source attribute table for <tab:content>: `title | タブに表示する見出し | 文字列 | ◎ | ◎`

findings.description: Section s3 (<tab:link>) hints are missing attribute names from the attribute table: `id`, `title`, `uri`, `cssClass`. These are all listed in the source attribute table for <tab:link>.
findings.source_evidence: Source attribute table for <tab:link> lists: id (○/○), title (◎/◎), uri (◎/×), cssClass (○/○), allowDoubleSubmission (○/×), dummyUri (×/○). Only `allowDoubleSubmission` and `dummyUri` are present in hints.
